introduction: Maa Computer  is a premier computer training institute established with a vision to provide quality computer education to students in Kalimela and surrounding areas. We offer a wide range of courses designed to meet the needs of today's IT industry.
history: Established in 2020, Maa Computer  Education has been serving the community for over 5 years. We started with a small classroom and have grown to become one of the most trusted computer training institutes in the region.
mission: To provide affordable, quality computer education to every student regardless of their background. We aim to bridge the digital divide and empower students with essential computer skills.
vision: To become the leading computer training institute in Odisha, recognized for excellence in education, training, and student success.
